name: Pasta with Shrimp and Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 1/3 of the butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
3. Add shrimp and cook until pink, about 2 minutes on each side. Remove shrimp using a slotted spoon and set aside.
4. Add remaining butter to the skillet and melt it.
5. Add broccoli, mushrooms, oregano, thyme, and basil; sauté for 2 minutes.
6. Add zucchini and continue cooking until vegetables are tender, about 2 minutes.
7. Reduce heat to low. Return shrimp to the skillet and heat through.
8. Arrange vegetables and shrimp over spaghetti.
9. Top with remaining garlic butter from the skillet.
10. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and serve immediately.
